- **Date:** 2026-03-25
- **Details:** Laws.Africa API (api.laws.africa/v3/) requires token authentication.
  Free registration available at edit.laws.africa/accounts/login/ for non-commercial use (CC-BY-NC-SA).
  Admin needs to: 1) Register account, 2) Get API token from edit.laws.africa/accounts/profile/api/
  Excellent REST API with Akoma Ntoso XML, HTML, PDF. 7K+ docs across South Africa, Namibia, Uganda, Zimbabwe.

- **Blocked reason:** terms_of_use
- **Date:** 2026-03-25
- **Details:** SAFLII terms of use (saflii.org/content/terms-use) explicitly prohibit:
  - All scraping, spidering, crawling, automated agents (Section 5(a)(ii))
  - AI-related use across entire collection (Section 2(e))
  - robots.txt blocks all non-Google bots from entire site
  No API, no bulk download. Would need written data agreement per Section 5(b).
